name: shakti-monorepo
description: SHAKTI — Hybrid Analytics and Knowledge-based Telecom Investigation Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n FE,ADMIN,BE,AI -c blue,cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd ai-services && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.db:init: cd database && psql -U shakti_admin -d shakti_db -f schema.sql
scripts.db:seed: echo seed.sql is deprecated; use npm run db:bootstrap-identities
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:init && npm run db:bootstrap-identities
scripts.test:unit: npm run test --workspace=frontend && npm run test --workspace=backend
scripts.test:smoke: wait-on http-get://localhost:5173 http-get://localhost:4174 http-get://localhost:3001/api/health && playwright test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/admin-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit && npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build:admin --workspace=frontend && npm run bundle:check
